gaps.description: Virtual catalog inherits physical catalog changes, product requires virtual catalog assignment. No tests validate B2B virtual catalog navigation or product visibility scoping.

gaps.feature: SEO - Meta tags, canonical URL, JSON-LD structured data
gaps.description: No tests for SEO meta tags on PDP/category pages, canonical URLs, or JSON-LD product structured data.
CAT-001 covers basic navigation. No test navigates top → subcategory → sub-subcategory and verifies breadcrumbs at each level.
No test for what happens when a category has zero products — empty state message, filter behavior, etc.
CAT-012 covers B2C variation selection. No test validates that PDP shows all required sections (specs, reviews, availability) for configurable products per BL-CAT-006.
CAT-010 covers basic PDP info. No dedicated test for specifications tab, customer reviews section, or tab switching on PDP.

gaps.feature: Typo tolerance / fuzzy matching / Did you mean
gaps.description: No test verifies fuzzy matching or 'did you mean' suggestions for misspelled queries.
No test explicitly verifies that facet filter counts match the actual number of filtered products. BL-SRCH-001 invariant unchecked.

gaps.feature: Search index consistency after catalog change
gaps.description: No cross-layer test verifying that search results update after a catalog change (e.g., product price update in admin reflects in search within lag window).

gaps.feature: Sort order reset on filter application
gaps.description: No test checks whether applying a filter resets the sort order to default or preserves the user-selected sort.
CAT-005 covers basic price range. No test for exact boundary ($20.00 product with $20 max filter), zero-width range, or inverted min>max handling.

gaps.feature: Multi-select filter AND vs OR logic
gaps.description: CAT-025 tests multi-select within a facet group but doesn't verify if multi-select across different facet groups uses AND logic. ECL-3.2 flags this as a common failure.
